stable_visual_summary: The Knave is a singular entity made entirely of cardboard. This composition dictates a rigid, planar physical build that lacks traditional organic mass or the ability to swim effectively in water.

unresolved_ambiguities: Specific dimensions or scale of the figure are unknown.
